HomePage.heroSubtitle: Rankings and tournaments for competitive games.

games.title: Games
games.description: Choose a game to view its rankings, performance history and ladders.
games.cardFallbackDescription: Open the game page to inspect current rankings.
games.noGamesDescription: Add games to the database or reconnect the current database to load the list here.

GamesPage.title: Games
GamesPage.description: Choose a game to view its rankings, performance history and ladders.
GamesPage.cardFallbackDescription: Open the game page to inspect current rankings.
GamesPage.noGamesDescription: Add games to the database or reconnect the current database to load the list here.
GamesPage.noGamesFound: No games found for this search
GamesPage.noGamesFoundDescription: Try searching for another game title or check for typos.

ProfilePage.noGames: You haven't played any games yet

ProfilePage.noGamesDescription: Join a game to appear in its rankings.
ProfilePage.noGamesDescriptionOther: This user is not participating in any game rankings.

GamePage.dbUnavailableDescription: Start your Postgres instance or update `.env` with a reachable connection string to view this game page.
GamePage.noPlayers: This ranking doesn't have players yet.
GamePage.noRankings: No rankings created for this game.
GamePage.noRankingsDescription: Once rankings are entered, this page will list players in order of points.
GamePage.sidebarDescription: Track player rankings and performance for this game.
GamePage.rankingInfoDescription: This ranking is calculated based on points. The results are frequently updated by game administrators.
GamePage.pendingNotice: Game is pending and needs approval

EditProfile.title: Edit Profile
EditProfile.description: Update your personal information and biography.

name.label: Display Name

name.taken: This display name is already taken.

bio.label: Biography
bio.placeholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...

AddGame.title: Suggest Game
AddGame.description: Fill in the initial details to register a new game.
AddGame.descriptionLoggedOut: Sign in to submit a new game idea.

reviewAlert.title: Your game will go through publication
reviewAlert.description: Because you do not have Manage Games permission, this game will be saved as pending and must be approved before becoming public to everyone.

AddGame.loginHint: We need your account so the game can keep track of who suggested it.
AddGame.successPending: Game idea submitted! It is now pending approval.

RegisterConfirm.title: Confirm Registration
RegisterConfirm.description: You will start with {elo} Elo points. Do you want to continue?

EditGame.title: Modify Game
EditGame.description: Update the information and images of this platform.

ApproveGame.title: Confirm Approval
ApproveGame.description: Are you sure you want to approve '{gameName}'? It will be visible to all users immediately.

AddRanking.title: Add Ranking
AddRanking.description: Create a new ranking category for this game (e.g., Blitz, Rapid, Competitive).

slug.label: Ranking Link
slug.description: Personalizes the URL for this ranking (e.g., /rankings/blitz).

AddPlayer.title: Add Player
AddPlayer.description: Create or link a player to this game.
AddPlayer.successExisting: The user already has a registration for this game. The new username has been attached to the existing player.

EditRanking.title: Modify Ranking
EditRanking.description: Update information for this ranking category.

slug.label: Ranking Link
slug.description: Personalizes the URL for this ranking (e.g., /rankings/blitz).

AddPlayerToRanking.title: Register Player
AddPlayerToRanking.description: Add an existing or new player to this ranking.
